title: Need Help on the last step for the Quickstart - ReactJS guide

posts.author: cmoffitt (Chris )
posts.cookedHtml:
Screen Shot 2021-04-12 at 1.57.49 PM1964×942 106 KB

I’m having trouble with step 5, " 1. Open a board, and add your view to it. You should see your app display data for the first item on the board."

I don’t see how to find my view when I open up a board.

Do I first need to have an admin of the account “install” the app?

Screen Shot 2021-04-12 at 1.59.42 PM1594×642 37.6 KB

Some screen shots in this section would be helpful

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Chris, sorry for the late reply here. Did you resolve this issue or do you still need help?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Chris, since we’ve not heard from you for a while I’m going to close this topic. You can reopen it by clicking the icon in the bottom right and hitting “New Topic” if you need to!
